evals.prompt: Build a full Web3 marketing plan for a project called Fluxion — it's a DeFi yield aggregator on Avalanche.
evals.expected_output: A complete output with all 4 deliverables: GTM Launch Plan, Campaign Calendar, Community Scripts, and On-Chain Retention Strategy. Content should be Avalanche-specific and DeFi-appropriate.
expectations: Output contains a GTM Launch Plan with a Project Summary section
Output contains a Campaign Calendar with at least 3 weeks of daily entries
Output contains at least 3 Discord scripts labeled D1, D2, or similar
Output contains at least 2 X (Twitter) scripts including an explainer thread
Output contains an On-Chain Retention Strategy with user tier segmentation
No placeholder text like [INSERT HERE] or [TBD] remains in the output
Avalanche is referenced specifically (not generic chain references)
Tone has no hype language (no 'revolutionary', 'game-changing', 'LFG')
Retention KPIs include D7 and D30 retention targets
Campaign calendar includes Discord, X, and Telegram entries

evals.prompt: Create a GTM launch plan for a Web3 project: Project Name: Kokolo, Chain: Base, Product Type: GameFi — a competitive card battle game.
evals.expected_output: A complete output with all 4 deliverables, adapted for GameFi on Base. Calendar should reflect game-specific cadence (daily events), scripts should fit gaming community tone.
expectations: Output contains all 4 deliverables labeled clearly
GTM positioning includes a narrative hook using the formula from the skill
Campaign calendar shows daily Discord event posts appropriate for GameFi
Community scripts include Discord welcome and launch day messages
On-chain retention uses GameFi-specific segment criteria (sessions, matches)
Base chain is referenced correctly
No token-specific language (no 'buy tokens', 'TGE') unless brief included token info
D7 retention target is present in the retention KPIs section
X thread script has 7 tweets with correct structure
Tone is education-first with no hype language

evals.prompt: My project is called Vaultr. It's a crypto-native payroll and invoicing app on Avalanche. Help me build a go-to-market strategy.
evals.expected_output: Full 4-deliverable output with payments/infra framing. Target audience should be inferred as freelancers, DAOs, or remote-first teams. Metrics targets should reflect infrastructure-type product.
expectations: Output contains all 4 deliverables
Product type is treated as payments/infrastructure (not DeFi or GameFi)
Target audience is inferred (freelancers, DAOs, or similar — not left blank)
GTM success metrics reference API calls, integrations, or recurring usage
Campaign calendar Week 1 includes an X explainer thread
At least 2 Telegram scripts are included
On-chain retention segments use payments/infra criteria
Retention message templates are present and filled (no empty brackets)
Avalanche is referenced correctly
Launch phases are present: Pre-Launch, Launch Week, Post-Launch

evals.prompt: Write me community engagement scripts for a Web3 oracle project called DataPulse on Solana.
evals.expected_output: Even though only scripts were requested, output should include all 4 deliverables as per the skill's defaults. Scripts should be platform-native: Discord conversational, Telegram brief, X punchy.
expectations: Output includes Discord scripts (at least D1 welcome and D2 launch day)
Output includes Telegram scripts (at least T1 channel launch and T2 launch alert)
Output includes X scripts (at least X1 launch post and X2 explainer thread)
All scripts have [Project Name] replaced with DataPulse
Solana is referenced appropriately
Oracle/data product type is reflected in script content
Discord scripts use line breaks and minimal formatting as specified
Telegram scripts are 200–400 characters
X thread has 7 tweets following the template structure
GTM Plan and Retention strategy are also included (full suite, not scripts only)
